query:
-- 1. 检查cities表中是否还存在西双版纳城市
SELECT id, name FROM cities WHERE name LIKE '%西双版纳%';

-- 2. 检查partner_cities表中是否还有引用西双版纳城市ID的记录
SELECT 
  pc.id as partnerCityId,
  pc.partnerId,
  pc.cityId,
  c.name as cityName,
  pc.contractStatus
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE pc.cityId IN (SELECT id FROM cities WHERE name LIKE '%西双版纳%')
   OR (c.id IS NULL AND pc.cityId IS NOT NULL);

-- 3. 检查所有partner_cities表中cityId为NULL或引用不存在的城市的孤儿记录
SELECT 
  pc.id as partnerCityId,
  pc.partnerId,
  pc.cityId,
  c.name as cityName,
  pc.contractStatus,
  CASE 
    WHEN c.id IS NULL THEN '孤儿记录:城市不存在'
    ELSE '正常记录'
  END as recordStatus
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE c.id IS NULL;

-- 4. 检查所有partners表中userId为NULL或引用不存在的用户的孤儿记录
SELECT 
  p.id as partnerId,
  p.userId,
  p.name as partnerName,
  p.phone as partnerPhone,
  u.name as userName,
  CASE 
    WHEN u.id IS NULL THEN '孤儿记录:用户不存在'
    ELSE '正常记录'
  END as recordStatus
FROM partners p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE u.id IS NULL;
